channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Speaker Johnson Says Republicans Will Act Swiftly on Election Bill
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson stated on Sunday that Republicans plan to move quickly to pass President Donald Trump's key election legislation.

item.title: Obama's Influence Looms Over 2028 Democratic Primary
item.description: Former President Barack Obama remains the most popular figure in the Democratic Party, even as he maintains a lower public profile since leaving office.

item.title: THE ESSEX FILES: How Trump's Quiet, Direct Leverage Secured Freedom for Persecuted Chinese Pastor
Former Texas Rep. William Archer Jr. Dies at 98
item.description: Former Texas Republican Rep. William Archer Jr. passed away on Saturday, July 4, at the age of 98. He previously served as a U.S. Army captain.
